name: Flint the Assault Leader
lines: I can smell those canvases burning from here. How satisfying.
The real show begins when the hostages start pouring out screaming. Get ready.
If we cut the power to this sector, even the people at the bottom will have a bright night for once.

friendly.greeting: You're here? Things have gotten easier thanks to you joining. I'll watch your back.
friendly.farewell: Go on ahead. I need to stay and see this damn machine turn completely to ash.

normal.greeting: Don't loiter around unless you want a stray bullet to put a hole in you.
normal.farewell: Watch out for yourself if you want to live. I don't have the luxury of lookin' after dead weight.

hostile.greeting: Still haven't gotten lost? Not being able to finish you off during that ambush will be the regret of your life.
hostile.farewell: You can't leave this floor even if you run. Next time, I'll drive a piece of flint into your heart.

deathLine: The flame... has not... gone out yet...
description: The assault leader of the Resistance. Possesses a rough and explosive personality, just like his name.

initial_script.text: Abstract geometric patterns shimmer on the digital canvases covering the entire wall.
The light dyes everything around it in eerie colors.

initial_script.name: Flint
initial_script.text: (His face distorts under the violet radiance emitting from the canvas.)

initial_script.name: Flint
initial_script.text: Disgusting. People are dying in the dark down below for lack of a single light bulb...

initial_script.name: Flint
initial_script.text: And here they are, sucking up half the city's electricity just for this so-called 'art'?

initial_script.name: Flint
initial_script.text: (The spit on the floor glistens strangely under the fluorescent light.)

initial_script.name: Flint
initial_script.text: Only when I tear down these walls will these bastards finally see how filthy their hands really are.

initial_script.name: Flint
initial_script.text: ...Who's there? Stop peeping like a rat and crawl out.

encounter.choice_ask: What the hell is going on here?
encounter.choice_surprise: (Surprise Attack: Strike Flint while his guard is down.)
encounter.surprise_attack_msg: [You] (Instead of answering, you draw your weapon and lunges at Flint's opening!)
encounter.surprise_attack_reply: Flint: "Ha! The rat bares its teeth. Your corpse won't even be worth putting on the bargaining table. Die!"
encounter.ask_reply_1:
Flint: "We're going to capture all the 'VIPs' on this floor alive.
We need them on a leash if we want a chance to negotiate with that Reaper bastard."
encounter.ask_reply_2: Flint: "Now, choose. Will you join us in this 'hostage hunt,' or will you vanish into history along with those pieces of trash?"
encounter.select_final: How will you respond to Flint's offer?
encounter.choice_join: A bargaining chip needs to be solid. I'll help. (Join)
encounter.choice_refuse: I won't tolerate taking innocent people as hostages. (Refuse)
encounter.result_join: Flint: "Heh, I knew you were a sharp one. Here, take this as a down payment. It's a 'Large Potion' looted from a VIP locker."
encounter.result_refuse: Flint: "Innocent people? Ha! None of those high-living bastards on these upper floors have clean hands. Your stupid morality will be the death of you."
